prestazioni: Engine swap to Toyota's 2GR-FKS 3.5L V6 (from the XV70 TRD or Lexus IS 350 F-Sport) with a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger, custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust by HKS Hi-Power, and a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU for precise boost control (targeting 12 psi on 93 octane for ~450 whp).

Full bolt-on reinforcement with a K1 Technologies forged crankshaft, Manley H-beam connecting rods, and JE Pistons 8.5:1 forged pistons to handle the increased power. Upgraded fuel system includes twin Walbro 450 LPH fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors, and a Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator.

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (XV70-specific valving), Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm), and Cusco front strut tower bar. Braking system upgraded to DBA 5000 Series rotors with Ferodo DS2500 pads and Goodridge G-Stop braided stainless steel brake lines.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (XV70-specific) with custom carbon fiber front splitter and rear diffuser by Seibon Carbon. Rear wing is a custom 1-piece carbon fiber GT-style wing by APR Performance (30-inch chord, 65-inch span).

Full respray in Toyota's 'Burnt Orange Metallic' (080) with a 3-stage PPF by XPEL Ultimate Plus. OEM+ lighting upgrades include Lamin-X yellow fog light covers, Morimoto XB LED headlights (DRL/low beam), and Diode Dynamics SS360 Pro LED reverse lights.

Interior overhaul with Recaro SPG XL seats (XV70-specific mounting brackets), NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub, and a custom roll cage by Custom Cages (6-point, TIG-welded chromoly). Shift knob replaced with a weighted MOMO Prototipo (V6 models only) and full sound deadening with Kilmat 80 mil butyl sheets.
